svg.title: URL Shortening and Redirect Workflow
svg.desc: Two parallel flows: create a short URL on the left, and the redirect/analytics flow on the right.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should the frontend validate a URL before submitting?')
sendPrompt('What does the POST /urls endpoint do on the backend?')
sendPrompt('How should the short code be generated?')
sendPrompt('What does the URLs record look like in the database?')
sendPrompt('What should the dashboard show after a URL is created?')
sendPrompt('How does a visitor use a short URL?')
sendPrompt('How should the server look up the short code in the database?')
sendPrompt('How should click analytics be recorded on each redirect?')
sendPrompt('What does the visitor experience when clicking a short link?')
sendPrompt('How should the analytics API aggregate visit data?')
g.text: Aggregate Visits where urlId = id → total count, last timestamp, recent 10 visits
Bonus: group by date for daily chart | group by country for geo breakdown
Return JSON to frontend → render with Recharts or Chart.js
